name: Whitehaven Coal Limited
analysis: WHC has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$8.7701. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$8.8832 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$8.7701, stop A$7.6131, target A$9.0700. Risk/reward is 0.26:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
